name: Linguistics, Bachelor of Arts

requirements.heading: Preparatory Subject Matter
notes: Foreign language, one course beyond the 15-unit requirement of the College of Letters & Science in the same language used to fulfill the college requirement.

requirements.heading: Depth Subject Matter
notes: Choose at least 8 upper division units:
Any LIN upper division course not used to fulﬁll area above or one of the approved courses below.

advising_notes: Honors & Honors Program: The honors program consists of 6 units of 194H credit normally taken in the fall and winter quarters of the senior year. Completion of the program is a prerequisite for High or Highest Honors at graduation. Specific eligibility criteria may be obtained from the major advisor. For general information regarding graduation with honors and Dean’s Honors Lists, please see Academic Information.
